zh.lifeSummary: Katherine Harrington是James Harrington和Isabella Harrington的女兒，於1389年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾布拉可洛德。她與Roger de Hulton結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1451年在英國英格蘭享年62歲。

nameMeanings.name: Harrington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Harrington (Cumberland, Lincolnshire, Northamptonshire). The Cumberland placename derives from the Old English personal name Hæfer + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The Lincolnshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Hearra + Old English connective -ing- + tūn. The Northamptonshire derives from an Old English personal name Hǣthhere + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Herendeen .
Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArrachtáin ‘descendant of Arrachtán’, a personal name from a diminutive of arrachtach ‘mighty, powerful’.
Irish: in Kerry, this name was adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hIongardail, later Ó hUrdáil, ‘descendant of Iongardal’, a personal name of uncertain origin.

variants.name: Herington
meanings: English: variant of   Harrington   or   Herrington  .

variants.name: Herrington
meanings: habitational name from Heronden in Tenterden (Kent) or Herrington in Houghton (Durham). The Kent placename may derive from an Old English personal name Hȳra + Old English connective -ing- + denn ‘pasture’, while the Durham placename may come from Old English hæring ‘rocky place’ (from hær ‘rock, heap of stones’ + the placename forming suffix -ing) or hæren ‘rocky’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Arrington
meanings: variant of Harrington with loss of initial H-.
possibly a habitational name from Arrington, a place in Cambridgeshire, named from an Old English byname, Earn(a), meaning ‘eagle’ + -inga- ‘people or followers of’ + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: Katherine Harrington was born in 1389, in Blackrod, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of James Harrington and Isabella Harrington. She married Roger de Hulton. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1451, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Katherine Harrington est née en 1389, à Blackrod, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de James Harrington et Isabella Harrington. Elle a épousé Roger de Hulton. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1451, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Katherine Harrington wurde 1389 in Blackrod, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von James Harrington und Isabella Harrington geboren. Sie hat Roger de Hulton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1451 im Alter von 62 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1451, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Harringtonは1389年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアブラクロドでJames HarringtonとIsabella Harringtonの娘として生まれた。Roger de Hultonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1451年にイギリスイギリスで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Harrington(은)는 1389년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 블랙로드에서 James Harrington(와)과 Isabella Harrington의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Roger de Hulton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1451년 영국 잉글랜드에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Katherine Harrington родилась в 1389 г. в местности блэккрод, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали James Harrington и Isabella Harrington. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Hulton. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1451 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.
